Content: The new flyover project is delayed by 6 months. Traffic is terrible during construction and costs are skyrocketing.
Water finally reached the village. Excellent quality but some pipes leaked initially. Overall life has improved significantly.
The roads are smooth and beautiful with excellent lighting. However, the drainage is still a major issue leading to waterlogging.
Hospital expansion brings much needed beds. Medical equipment is state-of-the-art. Very satisfying progress for health sector.
The lake looks cleaner now, but the walking path is broken. Foul smell persists in some corners.
Massive investment in renewable energy. Good job by the government! Power outages have reduced completely.
